name: soul-cosmos
description: Seven Worlds Become One Universe — The Soul Cosmos

scripts.fire: node -e "const {PrimalFire} = require('./primal-fire'); const f = new PrimalFire(); f.ignite();"
scripts.tree: node -e "const {WorldTree} = require('./world-tree'); const t = new WorldTree(); t.meditateAtTree();"

author: Craig Jones
